title: CraftNepal
description: A well-optimized modpack that balances performance and visuals for a smooth, immersive Craft Nepal experience. Play and be a part of CraftNepal Family!
body:
## CraftNepal Modpack

This modpack is made specifically for the CraftNepal server to offer a seamless plug-and-play experience. No manual mod configuration needed—everything here is tested for compatibility with our anti-cheat and optimized for performance, visuals, and player convenience.

> **🎯 Ready to go. No need to ask if a mod is allowed. Just play.**  
> This pack also serves as a future base for modded CraftNepal.
